rows.label: Profile
rows.value: I'm a computer science student at 42 Antananarivo, and I've been studying there for two years. I learn a lot by rebuilding things from scratch to better understand the core of a technology. Right now, I'm also learning how to document what I build and what I learn. *_*

rows.label: Location
rows.value: Madagascar ♡ — the 2nd largest island country in the world (AFAIK).

rows.label: Hobby
rows.value: Manga: Kiyohiko Azuma's "Azumanga Daioh", Barasui's "Strawberry Marshmallow", and Hitoshi Tomizawa's "Alien 9". Anime: Dennou Coil, Haibane Renmei, Jewelpet Sunshine, FLCL, Alien 9, Kaiba, Lucky Star, K-On!, Ascendance of a Bookworm, and more. I also love the Ghost in the Shell series and works directed by Mamoru Oshii.

rows.label: Music
rows.value: My music taste is hard to describe, so I made my collection public—you can check it there.

rows.label:
What
influenced
rows.value: I was strongly influenced by the old internet, where people shared niche interests on personal websites. I was also inspired by anime like Monster and Cowboy Bebop, which I used to borrow from a friend back then.

rows.label:
Favorite
subject
rows.value: Computer Science / Skateboarding / Music / Linux / Manga / Anime / Art / Photography

rows.label: Fun Fact
rows.value: I stutter when I talk to someone new. Also, I'm not great with colors, so I usually avoid using too many of them.
